title: fix-run synthesis output
description: The final synthesizer's output over a completed fix run — the counterpart of the diagnosis workflow's REPORT_SCHEMA. Turns the per-fix results into an operator-facing report plus a machine-readable disposition table.

report.description: Full markdown report: what was fixed, what was rejected and why, what remains, grouped by severity/component, ready for the operator to act on.

disposition_table.description: One row per finding the run touched.

disposition.description: fixed = a fix passed review; rejected = a fix was produced but failed review after the rework cap; unaddressed = the agent could not action the finding.
